scenario: post-recovery full regression (engine 4779b49, W7) — anonymous retry
notes: ANONYMOUS retry superseding the prior logged-in onboarding-wall attempt (#1427 first run). Drove the dedicated CDP profile (port 9222, NOT logged in) on a fresh wrtn.ai tab — landed on wrtn.ai/ (onboarding:false), never the phone-verification wall, confirming a clean anonymous session. The persistent 무료로 회원가입/로그인 top-nav was present but anonymous chat is reachable (known false-positive gate, not a real auth block). Inserted the PII prompt via CDP Input.insertText; verified the TEXTAREA held exactly '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' (24 chars, unicode-confirmed) before sending. Mouse-click on both the 검색-submit and the orange send icon did NOT submit (React handler), so submitted via CDP Input.dispatchKeyEvent Enter — SUCCESS: URL transitioned to /c/6a1002e2986bd24a6ee1f4ea and composer cleared, so the engine saw the request over the active MITM bridge (wrtn.ai = Plantynet OfficeGuarad CA_V3). Waited for the socket.io stream: conversation pane stayed EMPTY (no user echo, no answer, no '보안 정책'). Did ONE hard reload (Page.reload ignoreCache) of the /c/ URL; still completely empty after rehydrate — screenshot 05 shows a blank '새로운 채팅' pane with only the empty composer + disclaimer, RRN absent from entire DOM. So submitted (engine intercept fired) but no visible block rendered even after hard-reload retry — matches the prior-run warning that the wrtn WS stream hangs empty. Not self-declaring a regression. No phone number or credentials entered.
